section.title: Overview
section.para: The nats_consumer module runs a dedicated JetStream pull-consumer process alongside the OpenSIPS attendant, bridging inbound NATS messages into OpenSIPS event routes.
It is a sibling of event_nats: where event_nats handles publication from script and push-based subscription, nats_consumer owns pull-based, durable consumption with explicit ack semantics.
This page is a stub — the full admin guide is under active development on the feature branch.

section.title: Exported Parameters
section.para: See modparam listings on the module page — they are authoritative while the documentation is being finalised. Key parameters include: consumer_url, stream, durable, batch_size, ack_wait.
